depends_on.name: imagestack_id
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the image stack these parameters describe.

fields.name: dimension_order
fields.documentation: String encoding the spatial dimension order of the stack, one character per axis (e.g., 'YX' for a 2-D height-by-width image, 'ZYX' or 'TZYX' for higher-dimensional stacks).

fields.name: dimension_labels
fields.documentation: Comma-separated human-readable labels for each axis (e.g., 'height,width', 'depth,height,width'). One label per character in dimension_order.

fields.name: dimension_size
fields.documentation: Pixel/sample count along each axis. Length equals number of characters in dimension_order (e.g., [2208, 2752] for a 'YX' stack).

fields.name: dimension_scale
fields.documentation: Physical scale per axis (e.g., 94.89 micrometers per Y pixel). Same length as dimension_size; units captured in dimension_scale_units.

fields.name: dimension_scale_units
fields.documentation: Comma-separated unit names for each axis (e.g., 'micrometer,micrometer', 'micrometer,micrometer,micrometer').

fields.name: data_type
fields.documentation: The numeric data type of pixel values (e.g., 'uint16', 'single', 'double').

fields.name: data_limits
fields.documentation: 2-element [min, max] range of valid pixel values for the declared data_type (e.g., [0, 65535] for uint16).

fields.name: timestamp
fields.documentation: Acquisition timestamp of this image stack in the units of clocktype.

fields.name: clocktype
fields.documentation: Clock identifier in whose units `timestamp` is expressed (e.g., 'exp_global_time', 'dev_local_time'). Same vocabulary as the epochclocktimes/element_epoch clock names.
